query:
SELECT id, claim_number, vehicle_registration, status, source_document_id, 
       cost_estimate, key_facts_json, normalised_description, reported_cause_label
FROM claims 
WHERE id = 2730001;

SELECT id, document_type, title, file_name, file_url
FROM agency_documents
WHERE id = 630001;
